creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

libspamc does not compile on amd64. Can you have a look 
at this? 
http://people.freebsd.org/~erwin/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.1.7_3-with-spamc-amd64.log 

Also, the new files in pkg-plist should be made 
conditional so they are not packaged when libspamc is 
turned off: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~erwin/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.1.7_3-without-spamc.log
